schemes.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
schemes.description: Income support scheme providing financial assistance to all landholding farmers
schemes.eligibility: All landholding farmers (both small and marginal)
schemes.benefit: ₹6000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2000 each

schemes.name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
schemes.description: Credit scheme for farmers to meet their agricultural needs including crop cultivation and maintenance
schemes.eligibility: All farmers including tenant farmers, oral lessees, and sharecroppers
schemes.benefit: Credit up to ₹3 lakh at 7% interest with 3% subvention and additional 3% for prompt repayment
schemes.contact_info: Contact nearest bank branch or Primary Agricultural Credit Society

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemes.description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers in case of crop loss due to natural calamities
schemes.eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers
schemes.benefit: Sum insured up to actual crop value with premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial/horticultural crops

schemes.name: Soil Health Card Scheme
schemes.description: Provides soil testing and health card with crop-wise recommendations for nutrients and fertilizers
schemes.benefit: Free soil testing and health card every 2 years with recommendations for improving soil health
schemes.contact_info: Contact local agricultural office or Krishi Vigyan Kendra

schemes.name: Kisan Call Center (KCC)
schemes.description: Toll-free helpline for farmers to get agricultural advice and information
schemes.benefit: Free agricultural advisory services in 22 local languages

schemes.name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
schemes.description: Promotes organic farming through cluster approach and PGS certification
schemes.eligibility: Farmers willing to adopt organic farming practices
schemes.benefit: ₹50,000 per hectare over 3 years including certification support

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana (PMKSY)
schemes.description: Subsidy for micro-irrigation systems like drip and sprinkler
schemes.benefit: Subsidy up to 55% for small & marginal farmers, 45% for others

schemes.name: Kisan Vikas Patra (KVP)
schemes.description: Savings certificate scheme that doubles investment in specific period
schemes.benefit: Investment doubles in ~115 months with current interest rate
